programme.title: Men's basketball: Spanish League - Play-off quarterfinal match 1: Kosner Baskonia Vitoria-Gasteiz - Joventut Badalona
Men's Basketball: Spanish League - Play-off Quarterfinal Game 2: Barca - UCAM Murcia

Men's Basketball: Spanish League - Playoff Quarterfinal Game 3: Real Madrid - La Laguna Tenerife
Fight of the Night
programme.desc: Walka Wieczoru is a program for true fans of combat sports.Experts and invited guests discuss the most important galas, analyze key fights and present the profiles of the players.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Raków Częstochowa - SK Rapid Wien
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Legia Warszawa - AC Sparta Prague
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Jagiellonia Białystok - KuPS Kuopio
programme.desc: At the halfway point of the regular phase of the Conference League, Pride of Podlasie is in thirteenth place, which guarantees seeding in the play-off phase.Adrian Siemieniec's players remain undefeated, but they cannot be proud of their last performance.They only drew 1-1 with Macedonian Shkendija and scored the equalizing goal in the tenth minute of added time.Jagiellonia has a match against KuPS Kuopio, which, like itself, has five points.The Finnish team will take the field in Białystok encouraged by their 3-1 victory over Slovan Bratislava in the previous round.

programme.title: Archived UEFA Europa League finals
programme.sub-title: Atletico Madryt - Fuhlam FC - sezon 2009/2010
programme.desc: The creators of the program recall the final matches of the Europa League.Each episode presents a different fight.Viewers will once again see their most important moments and most beautiful actions.

programme.title: Archived UEFA Europa League finals
programme.sub-title: FC Porto - Sporting Braga - sezon 2010/2011
programme.desc: The creators of the program recall the final matches of the Europa League.Each episode presents a different fight.Viewers will once again see their most important moments and most beautiful actions.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - match: RC Strasbourg - Crystal Palace FC
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: FC Noah - Legia Warszawa
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Jagiellonia Białystok - Rayo Vallecano
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Lech Poznań - 1. FSV Mainz 05
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Raków Częstochowa - HSK Zrinjski Mostar
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: SK Sigma Olomouc - Lech Poznań
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: AZ Alkmaar - Jagiellonia Białystok
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Omonia FC - Raków Częstochowa
programme.desc: The Medals are one of three teams in the Conference League that have not yet been defeated in the regular round.The Częstochowa team has already secured their place in the knockout phase, but they do not intend to be satisfied with that.They are counting on direct promotion to the 1/8 finals, which will give them a place in the best eight at the end of the league phase of the competition.Before the clash with Omonia, coached by former Legia coach Henning Berg, they are in third place in the table.The team from Nicosia is fifteenth and has eight points, three less than Raków.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Legia Warszawa - Lincoln Red Imps FC
Football: UEFA Conference League - play-off match: KuPS Kuopio - Lech Poznań

programme.sub-title: Atletico Madryt - Athletic Bilbao - sezon 2011/2012
programme.desc: The creators of the program recall the final matches of the Europa League.Each episode presents a different fight.Viewers will once again see their most important moments and most beautiful actions.

programme.desc: The creators of the program recall the final matches of the Europa League.Each episode presents a different fight.Viewers will once again see their most important moments and most beautiful actions.

Athletes
programme.desc: Atleci is a magazine for everyone who loves sport.The program includes reports from events, conversations with stars, as well as practical advice, interesting people and unique places on the sports map of Poland.

programme.title: Tennis: ATP Tournament in Eastbourne - final match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Majorca - final match
Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Türkiye - Argentina
Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Canada - Brazil
Football: UEFA Europa League - match: FC Porto - Rangers FC
UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Lech Poznań - Juventus Turyn 01.12.2010 - sezon 2010/2011
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Aston Villa FC - FC Salzburg
programme.desc: The hosts are impressive in their form both domestically and in European cups.In the current edition of the Europa League, they lost only once - to Go Ahead Eagles (1-2), but since then they have won four in a row, including the last one over Fenerbahce (1-0).Aston Villa is already certain of promotion, taking second place in the table.The situation of the Austrians is definitely more difficult.RB Salzburg managed to win only two games and lost five.They are in a distant 28th place in the classification, and in order to advance to the play-off phase of the 1/16 finals, they must win in Birmingham and count on their rivals' mistakes.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Panathinaikos AO - AS Roma
Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: China - Türkiye
Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Panathinaikos AO - AS Roma
Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Argentina - Germany
Football: UEFA Europa League - match: 1/8 final: VfB Stuttgart - FC Porto
Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Slovenia - Canada
Football: UEFA Europa League - second leg play-off match: FC Viktoria Plzeň - Panathinaikos AO

programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Lech Poznań - Sporting Braga 17.02.2011 - sezon 2010/2011
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Europa League - second leg quarter-final match: Nottingham Forest FC - FC Porto
Football: UEFA Europa League - second leg quarter-final match: Aston Villa FC - Bologna FC
Football: UEFA Europa League - semi-final match: Nottingham Forest FC - Aston Villa FC
Football: UEFA Europa League - semi-final match: SC Braga - SC Freiburg
programme.desc: Both SC Freiburg and SC Braga will enter the semi-final of the Europa League in not the best form.The Germans were eliminated from the domestic cup, and in the last league match they lost 0:4 to Borussia Dortmund.The Portuguese, in turn, lost to Santa Clara 1-2 in the previous round.The team from Freiburg im Breisgau eliminated Celta Vigo in the quarterfinals, winning both games 3-1 and 3-0.The team from Braga turned out to be better than Real Betis.First, he drew at home 1:1, and then won sensationally away 4:2.

programme.title: Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Slovenia - Bulgaria
Football: UEFA Europa League - second leg semi-final match: Aston Villa FC - Nottingham Forest FC

Polsat Sport Talk Extra
programme.desc: Przemysław Iwańczyk talks about sports with people from outside his circle, including:from culture, medicine, science and politics.Thanks to them, sport appears as a complex process influencing results.

programme.desc: A program devoted to games from the main ATP Tour series.Fans will see, among others,announcements of upcoming tournaments.In addition, they will receive a portion of statistics and interesting facts, also from behind the scenes of the tennis world.

programme.title: Women's football: FA Cup - final match: Brighton & Hove Albion FC - Manchester City FC
Football - friendly match: Argentina - Iceland
programme.desc: The Argentines will finish their preparations for the tournament in North America with a competition against the Icelanders.The current world champions have faced them once.Then, during the 2018 World Cup, they drew with them 1:1.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Bolivia - Scotland
programme.desc: During the World Championships, the Scottish team will compete in a group including:with Morocco.The sparring with Bolivia is intended to familiarize the players with the South American style of play and give them a sample of what awaits them with Canarinhos.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Brazil - Egypt
programme.desc: At the end of May, the Brazilians showed their offensive power in a friendly match against Panama, defeating their opponents 6:2.The Egyptians also rejoiced in their victory.They won 1-0 against the Russian national team.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Argentina - Honduras
programme.desc: The world champions played two sparring matches this year.In the first match they were better than Mauritania, in the second match they beat Zambia.They will now face Honduras, ranked 66th in the FIFA rankings.

programme.title: Women's soccer: World Cup qualifiers - match: France - Ireland
Women's soccer: World Cup qualifying - match: Germany - Norway

programme.sub-title: Legia Warszawa - Molde FK - 22.02.2024 - 1/16 finału - sezon 2023/2024 - 2. mecz

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Morocco - Norway
programme.desc: The sensation of the previous World Cup will face the conquerors of Italy in the World Cup qualifiers.As part of their preparations for the championship, the Moroccans defeated, among others,5-0 Burundi and 2-1 Paraguay.

programme.title: Women's soccer: World Cup qualifying - match: Sweden - Italy

Football - friendly match: Morocco - Norway
programme.desc: The sensation of the previous World Cup will face the conquerors of Italy in the World Cup qualifiers.As part of their preparations for the championship, the Moroccans defeated, among others,5-0 Burundi and 2-1 Paraguay.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Brazil - Egypt
programme.desc: At the end of May, the Brazilians showed their offensive power in a friendly match against Panama, defeating their opponents 6:2.The Egyptians also rejoiced in their victory.They won 1-0 against the Russian national team.

programme.title: UEFA Conference League Archive
programme.sub-title: Djurgarden - Lech Poznań - 16.03.2023 - 1/8 finału - sezon 2022/2023 - 2 mecz

programme.title: Women's football: FA Cup - final match: Brighton & Hove Albion FC - Manchester City FC

Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Poland - Belgium
programme.desc: The second Nations League tournament with the participation of the White and Reds will take place in Gliwice.Nikola Grbic's team will start with a match against the team from Benelux, for which this is the premiere season in this competition.The Serbian coach will probably try to experiment with the national team again.This does not change the fact that the Poles will be clear favorites in the clash with the Belgians.They will face this rival for the first time since 2023.At that time, they won the Olympic qualifications only after a tie-break.

programme.title: Polsat Sport Talk Extra
programme.sub-title: Roman Gruszkiewicz
programme.desc: Przemysław Iwańczyk talks about sports with people from outside his circle, including:from culture, medicine, science and politics.Thanks to them, sport appears as a complex process influencing results.

programme.title: Women's volleyball: Nations League - match: Czech Republic - Dominican Republic

programme.sub-title: Roman Gruszkiewicz
programme.desc: Przemysław Iwańczyk talks about sports with people from outside his circle, including:from culture, medicine, science and politics.Thanks to them, sport appears as a complex process influencing results.

programme.title: Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Ukraine - Italy
Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Poland - Türkiye
Women's volleyball: Nations League - match: Germany - Brazil
Men's volleyball: Champions League - semi-final match: PGE Projekt Warszawa - Sir Sicoma Monini Perugia
programme.desc: This year, for the first time in history, Projekt from Warsaw was among the best teams on the Old Continent.The path of the capital team to the final tournament of the Champions League was not strewn with roses.Promotion to the play-off phase by a shot, then the golden set against Itas Trentino and the fierce competition against Bogdanka LUK Lublin in the quarterfinals showed that volleyball players from the capital do not give up in the most difficult moments.They will fight for promotion to the grand final against the defender of the trophy, Sir Sicoma Monini Perugia, whose important player is the Polish representative, Kamil Semeniuk.

programme.title: Women's volleyball: Nations League - match: Thailand - Netherlands
Men's volleyball: Champions League - semi-final match: Aluron CMC Warta Zawiercie - Ziraat Bank Ankara
Men's volleyball: Champions League - 3rd place match: PGE Projekt Warszawa - Ziraat Bank Ankara
Women's volleyball: Nations League - match: Germany - Brazil
Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Iran - Japan
Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Brazil - Italy
Women's volleyball: Nations League - match: Türkiye - China
Men's volleyball: Champions League - final match: Sir Sicoma Monini Perugia - Aluron CMC Warta Zawiercie
Men's volleyball: Champions League - final match: Sir Sicoma Monini Perugia - Aluron CMC Warta Zawiercie
Women's volleyball: Nations League - match: Germany - Brazil
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Halle - summary
Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Poland - Germany
Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Türkiye - Argentina
programme.desc: In their penultimate Nations League match at the PreZero Arena Gliwice, Argentina will face Turkey.The last two direct clashes between these teams were won by Albicelestes - the teams competed in the Nations League in 2024 and 2025.Two years ago, Argentina won 3-0, while last year's competition saw a more even competition.Ultimately, Argentina came out on top again (3:2).However, Turkish volleyball players can approach the next match with optimism, because the South American team did not perform well during the LN tournament in Brasília.

programme.title: Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Poland - Germany
Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: China - Germany
Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Belgium - Türkiye

programme.desc: The second Nations League tournament with the participation of the White and Reds will take place in Gliwice.Nikola Grbic's team will start with a match against the team from Benelux, for which this is the premiere season in this competition.The Serbian coach will probably try to experiment with the national team again.This does not change the fact that the Poles will be clear favorites in the clash with the Belgians.They will face this rival for the first time since 2023.At that time, they won the Olympic qualifications only after a tie-break.

programme.title: Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Poland - Germany
Men's volleyball: Nations League - match: Türkiye - Argentina
programme.desc: In their penultimate Nations League match at the PreZero Arena Gliwice, Argentina will face Turkey.The last two direct clashes between these teams were won by Albicelestes - the teams competed in the Nations League in 2024 and 2025.Two years ago, Argentina won 3-0, while last year's competition saw a more even competition.Ultimately, Argentina came out on top again (3:2).However, Turkish volleyball players can approach the next match with optimism, because the South American team did not perform well during the LN tournament in Brasília.

Athletes
programme.desc: Atleci is a magazine for everyone who loves sport.The program includes reports from events, conversations with stars, as well as practical advice, interesting people and unique places on the sports map of Poland.

programme.title: Boxing: Babilon Boxing Show & K1 in Nowy Sącz - light heavyweight: Rafał Dudek - Kajetan Kalinowski 2 11/04/2025
From the ESPN archives
programme.sub-title: Gala w Nowym Jorku: Cassius Clay (Muhammad Ali) - Doug Jones 13.03.1963
programme.desc: A reminder of the fights that aroused exceptional emotions in the boxing world.Viewers will once again see the clashes of the biggest stars of Polish and foreign boxing.

programme.title: Combat sports: FEN 55 in Ostróda - fight: Mansur Abdurzakov - Michał Pietrzak 15/06/2024
K.O.TV Classics
programme.desc: A reminder and analysis of the greatest boxing fights in the history of this sport.It presents, among others:memorable fights.

programme.title: Combat sports: UFC 315 - fight: Belal Muhammad - Jack Della Maddalena 11/05/2025
programme.desc: We will see two title fights at the Bell Center in Montreal.First, Valentina Shevchenko will enter the octagon to defend her flyweight belt for the tenth time.The contender for the title is Manon Fiorot from France.The main course will be the fight between Belal Muhammad and Jacek Della Maddalena.The popular Remember the Name won the welterweight championship on June 24, 2024, defeating Leon Edwards on points.The belt will be tried by Della Maddalena from Australia, who has won seventeen fights in a row, including seven under the UFC banner.

programme.title: Combat sports: UFC 323 - fight: Merab Dvalishvili - Petr Yan 2 07/12/2025
Boxing: Rocky Boxing Night in Żukowo - heavyweight: Mateusz Polski - Luis Romero Mendoza 26/10/2024
Athletes
programme.desc: Atleci is a magazine for everyone who loves sport.The program includes reports from events, conversations with stars, as well as practical advice, interesting people and unique places on the sports map of Poland.

programme.title: Combat sports: Babilon MMA 53 in Międzyzdroje - fight: Szymon Kołecki - Marcin Łazarz 18/07/2025
Combat sports: MMA NIGHT 12: Koszalin - fight: Łukasz Parobiec - Rafał Jaszczuk 07/03/2026
Combat sports: FEN 49 in Mrągowo - fight: Adrian Zieliński - Kamil Kraska 25/08/2023
From the ESPN archives
programme.sub-title: Gala w Nowym Jorku: Floyd Patterson - George Chuvalo 01.02.1965
programme.desc: A reminder of the fights that aroused exceptional emotions in the boxing world.Viewers will once again see the clashes of the biggest stars of Polish and foreign boxing.

programme.title: Boxing: Polsat Boxing Promotions 10 in Łódź - super middleweight: Osleys Iglesias - Ezequiel Maderna 24/09/2022
programme.desc: El Tornado de Cuba, Osleys Iglesias tied his fate with Poland.Since December 2021, he has appeared in galas organized by Polsat Boxing Promotions three times and emerged victorious three times.The talented Cuban's opponent will be a very experienced boxer from Argentina.35-year-old Ezequiel Maderna has 35 professional fights, 27 of which he won.Recently, however, he has not had a good streak and has suffered three defeats in a row.In March 2022, he was defeated by, among others, Paweł Stępień.

programme.title: K.O.TV Weekly
programme.desc: The latest news from the boxing world.Boxing fans will find in this program, among others:results of the most important fights, announcements of galas and interesting facts related to this spectacular sport.

programme.title: UFC Connected
programme.sub-title: Erin Blanchfield \u0026 Fatima Kline, Joselyne Edwards, Laura Sanko, Rose Namajunas
programme.desc: A program devoted to combat sports, especially events related to the UFC federation.Fans will find there, among others:interesting interviews with players, summaries of galas and various interesting facts.

programme.desc: The latest news from the boxing world.Boxing fans will find in this program, among others:results of the most important fights, announcements of galas and interesting facts related to this spectacular sport.
